remediation: Enable incoming certificates for clients
title: Web App accepts incoming client certificate

remediation: Register the app identity with AD
title: Web App has registration with AD enabled

remediation: Enable authentication to prevent anonymous request being accepted
title: App Service authentication is activated

remediation: You can redirect all HTTP requests to the HTTPS port.
title: Ensure the Function App can only be accessed via HTTPS. The default is false.

remediation: Use the latest version of HTTP
title: Web App uses the latest HTTP version

remediation: The TLS version being outdated and has known vulnerabilities
title: Web App uses latest TLS version

remediation: Disable public access to storage containers
title: Storage containers in blob storage mode should not have public access

remediation: Only allow secure connection for transferring data into storage accounts
title: Storage accounts should be configured to only accept transfers that are over secure connections

remediation: Enable logging for Queue Services
title: When using Queue Services for a storage account, logging should be enabled.

remediation: Allow Trusted Microsoft Services to bypass
title: Trusted Microsoft Services should have bypass access to Storage accounts

remediation: Use a more recent TLS version for the storage account
title: The minimum TLS version for Storage Accounts should be TLS1_2 or higher

remediation: Set network rules to deny
title: The default action on Storage account network rules should be set to deny

remediation: Set a network ACL for the key vault
title: Key vault should have the network acl block specified

remediation: Set an expiration date on the vault key
title: Ensure that the expiration date is set on all keys

remediation: Provide content type for secrets to aid interpretation on retrieval
title: Key vault Secret should have a content type set

remediation: Enable purge protection for key vaults
title: Key vault should have purge protection enabled

remediation: Set an expiry for secrets
title: Key Vault Secret should have an expiration date set

remediation: Provide at least one email address for threat alerts
title: At least one email address is set for threat alerts

remediation: Enable connection logging
title: Ensure server parameter 'log_connections' is set to 'ON' for PostgreSQL Database Server

remediation: Enable SSL enforcement
title: SSL should be enforced on database connections where applicable

remediation: Enable connection throttling logging
title: Ensure server parameter 'connection_throttling' is set to 'ON' for PostgreSQL Database Server

remediation: Disable public access to database when not required
title: Ensure databases are not publicly accessible

remediation: Enable email to subscription owners
title: Security threat alerts go to subscription owners and co-administrators

remediation: Enable checkpoint logging
title: Ensure server parameter 'log_checkpoints' is set to 'ON' for PostgreSQL Database Server

remediation: Set retention periods of database auditing to greater than 90 days
title: Database auditing retention period should be longer than 90 days

remediation: Use the most modern TLS policies available
title: Databases should have the minimum TLS set for connections

remediation: Enable auditing on Azure SQL databases
title: Auditing should be enabled on Azure SQL Databases

remediation: Use all provided threat alerts
title: No threat detections are set

remediation: Don't use wide ip ranges for the sql firewall
title: Ensure database firewalls do not permit public access

remediation: Use targeted permissions for roles
title: Roles limited to the required actions

remediation: Set a retention period that will allow for delayed investigation
title: Ensure the activity retention log is set to at least a year

remediation: Enable capture for all locations
title: Ensure activitys are captured for all locations

remediation: Configure log profile to capture all activities
title: Ensure log profile captures all activities

remediation: Set manage virtual network to enabled
title: Synapse Workspace should have managed virtual network enabled, the default is disabled.

remediation: Set public access to disabled for Data Factory
title: Data Factory should have public access disabled, the default is enabled.

remediation: Enable encryption of data lake storage
title: Unencrypted data lake storage.

remediation: Don't use sensitive credentials in the VM custom_data
title: Ensure that no sensitive credentials are exposed in VM custom_data

remediation: Enable encryption on managed disks
title: Enable disk encryption on managed disk

remediation: Use ssh authentication for virtual machines
title: Password authentication should be disabled on Azure virtual machines

remediation: Enable logging for AKS
title: Ensure AKS logging to Azure Monitoring is Configured

remediation: Limit the access to the API server to a limited IP range
title: Ensure AKS has an API Server Authorized IP Ranges enabled

remediation: Enable RBAC
title: Ensure RBAC is enabled on AKS clusters

remediation: Configure a network policy
title: Ensure AKS cluster has Network Policy configured

remediation: Set alert notifications to be on
title: Send notification emails for high severity alerts

remediation: Enable standard subscription tier to benefit from Azure Defender
title: Enable the standard security center subscription tier

remediation: Set a telephone number for security center contact
title: The required contact details should be set for security center

remediation: Set a more restrictive cidr range
title: A security group rule should not allow unrestricted ingress from any IP address.

remediation: Block RDP port from internet
title: A security group should not allow unrestricted ingress to the RDP port from any IP address.

remediation: Ensure flow log retention is turned on with an expiry of >90 days
title: Retention policy for flow logs should be enabled and set to greater than 90 days

remediation: Block port 22 access from the internet
title: Security group should not allow unrestricted ingress to SSH port from any IP address.

remediation: Set a more restrictive cidr range
title: A security rule should not allow unrestricted egress to any IP address.

remediation: Avoid granting 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/write' permission in custom roles. Restrict role creation capability to core admins only.
title: Role Definition Allows Custom Role Creation

remediation: Enable soft delete for blobs with an appropriate retention period
title: Storage account should have blob soft delete enabled

remediation: Enable logging for at least one storage service (Queue, Table, or Blob)
title: Storage account should have logging enabled

remediation: Configure storage account to use geo-redundant replication (GRS, RAGRS, GZRS, or RAGZRS)
title: Storage account should use geo-redundant replication

remediation: Enable secure transfer and set minimum TLS version to TLS1_2 or higher
title: Storage account should have secure transfer and minimum TLS version configured

remediation: Configure customer-managed keys for storage account encryption
title: Storage account should use customer-managed keys for encryption

remediation: Enable infrastructure encryption for storage account
title: Storage account should have infrastructure encryption enabled

remediation: Set additional security contact emails in Defender for Cloud under Environment Settings > Email notifications.
title: Security Contact Email

remediation: Enable alert notifications in Defender for Cloud and configure security contacts.
title: Email Alerts Disabled

remediation: Enable the security contact to ensure security notifications are delivered.
title: Security Contact Disabled

remediation: Provision the AKS cluster with `private_cluster_enabled = true` and use private endpoints.
title: Ensure AKS cluster has private cluster enabled

remediation: Enable Azure Policy add-on on the AKS cluster to enforce governance policies.
title: Ensure AKS cluster has Azure Policy add-on enabled

remediation: Configure a disk encryption set ID for the AKS cluster to enable customer-managed key encryption.
title: Ensure AKS cluster has disk encryption set ID configured

remediation: Associate an NSG to the VM's NIC or subnet to control traffic.
title: VM Not Attached To Network

remediation: Update to a supported PHP version (8.1 or higher). Consider migrating from azurerm_app_service to azurerm_linux_web_app for access to modern PHP versions.
title: App Service Using Unsupported PHP Version

remediation: Update to a supported Python version (3.9 or higher). Consider migrating from azurerm_app_service to azurerm_linux_web_app for access to modern Python versions.
title: App Service Using Unsupported Python Version

remediation: Set FTPS state to 'FTPS Only' in App Service settings to prevent plaintext FTP.
title: App Service FTPS Enforce Disabled

remediation: Set 'HTTPS Only' to true in App Service TLS settings to force encrypted transport.
title: Web App Accepting Traffic Other Than HTTPS

remediation: Enable NSG flow logs via Network Watcher and configure a storage account for log export.
title: Network Watcher Flow Disabled

remediation: Remove NSG rules allowing legacy or unencrypted protocols on broad scopes.
title: Sensitive Port Is Exposed To Entire Network

remediation: Disable IP forwarding on network interfaces unless specifically required for routing purposes.
title: Network Interfaces IP Forwarding Enabled

remediation: Remove public IP addresses from network interfaces unless they are specifically required for internet connectivity.
title: Network Interfaces With Public IP
